content.en:
Time flies.

Ye Tian gradually obtained a lot of resources in the space-time ancient demon realm, and he also comprehended many mysteries from the reflection of time and space.

At this moment, Ye Tian not only improved the Ultimate Rule Realm a bit, but was even expected to create a third peak Ultimate Arcane.

Moreover, I am also preparing to use this place to create ~ the third form secret method.

Another period of time has passed.

this day.

Ye Tian finally created the third peak ultimate arcane - Aromu Gold-Light!

Aromu Golden Light is the pinnacle ultimate arcane with both defense and speed, once he casts the pinnacle ultimate arcane of Aromu Golden Light, his speed will skyrocket, and he can also use Aromu's golden light to resist the enemy's attacks.

It can be said that the use of the golden light of Aromu is extremely great, compared to the armor of Aromu and the sword light of Aromu, the golden light of Aromu is more perfect, after all, his current foundation realm and mastery of knowledge are far better than before, and now he can naturally create a more perfect peak ultimate arcane.

After that, he went all out to create the third form secret method, this time focusing on attack power, after all, the ten thousand form is too comprehensive, and the Arojin body form is completely focused on defense, if he creates a form secret method that only focuses on attack, it can make his strength skyrocket a lot.

He constantly felt the reflection of the killing between the two ultimate ancient demons, and felt the many mysteries in it, and every move brought the attack to the most vivid level, bringing him infinite insights.

Just when the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space was about to close, Ye Tian finally realized the third form secret method - the arm form of Aluo!

After creating this third form secret method, Ye Tian immediately left.

After that, all of his duplicate bodies converged, and the collected resources were placed on one of the duplicated bodies, and all the other duplicated bodies annihilated themselves.

After all, only one replica body is allowed to go out, and he can't leave a replica body here, otherwise the consequences will be serious.

It is said that once a strong person is left in the space-time ancient demon realm, when the space-time ancient demon realm is closed, he will be directly killed by the space-time ancient demon pillar, and it will even affect the clones and bodies of the outside world.

If it weren't for that, there would have been a strong emperor with a clone, who would have sent a clone in and been collecting resources.

"It's almost time!"

Ye Tian immediately shuttled out of the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm.

......

Outside the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space.

A number of emperor list powerhouses have come out one after another, but there are also some emperor list powerhouses who have stayed forever.

At this time, Ye Tian saw Amusha, the other party's face was calm, and there was no injury on his body at all.

However, many of the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses in the main department were extremely annoyed, because the Emperor List powerhouses they sent in had fallen one, and some had even fallen.

For example, the Yanxi tribe.

Dover was killed before, causing them to lose a strong man on the Emperor List, but now they haven't even seen the last Emperor List powerhouse, and they should have fallen inside.

It's just that that person's status is not too high, and the main department of Yanxi did not notify Yanxi Fortress.

"Damn, the two Emperor List powerhouses of our Yanxi main department have both fallen in the space-time ancient demon realm, and they have not gained any benefits, and they have even suffered heavy losses. The Yanchen Ancient Demon was furious, staring at some of the surviving Emperor List powerhouses, as if each of them was suspicious.

However, what happened in the Ancient Demon Realm of Time and Space is not allowed to be said, let alone revenge.

"Let's go!"

The Flame Dust Ancient Demon left with several top-level Ancient Demon-level powerhouses.

"Let's go too!" said the Ao Retro Demon.

So, Ye Tian and Amusa followed the Ao Gu Demon and they returned to the Aromu Fortress from here.

......

Aromu Fortress.

After Ye Tian and the others returned, they demanded to hand over all the treasures they had obtained from the Time and Space Ancient Demon Realm.

Boom!!!

The dense resources were moved out of the void in Ye Tian's body, and their amount was very amazing, and each resource was extremely precious, which made the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses a little moved.

However, they only had some desires, but they didn't dare to covet these things, otherwise they would be doomed once the Ultimate Ancient Demons knew about it.

Amusha also took out a bunch of treasures, but the number was less than Ye Tian's, and the total value was lower.

Then.

Amusha stared at Ye Tian in some surprise, after all, she felt that she had obtained a lot of resources, and she should not be less than Ye Tian!

"Amusha, you can take seventy percent of these resources!"

Retro Magic Road.

Amusha took seventy percent of the resources, and in front of Ye Tian, he was not worried that Ye Tian would be dissatisfied.

After Amusha, the Ao Retro Demon asked Ye Tian to take half of the resources.

Ye Tian didn't say anything, and directly took half of the resources.

Even though he only had half of the resources, the value of the resources he received was about the same as the resources on Amusha.

Afterwards.

The Ao Retro Demon took these resources with other top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses from the Arrow Mother Fortress, and they needed to send these resources to the Arrow Mother Headquarters.

......

"This harvest is too big, so many resources are enough for me to break through to the ancient demon level realm in the future, and I don't need to worry about resources!"

Ye Tian muttered.

However, there is another problem, that is, he has no backer, Amusa has a backer, and no one dares to hit her attention.

However, he can't, I'm afraid that many top ancient demon-level powerhouses are secretly staring at him, after all, once you kill him, you can get countless resources.

In the Arrow Mother Fortress, he doesn't have to worry about his safety, but once he goes out, let alone the top Gu Demon-level powerhouses in the other main departments, I'm afraid that even some of the top Ancient Demon-level powerhouses in the main department of the Arrow Mother will be excited!

"Cultivate for a period of time first, and cultivate the Mystic Technique of Ten Thousand Law Forms, the Secret Technique of the Golden Body Form, and the Secret Technique of the Arm of the Arrow Form to the Second Form Perfection Realm, and then impact the Ancient Demon Level Realm, there is no need to continue to delay!"

Ye Tian decided.

So for the next few years, he went into retreat and penance at the Aromu Fortress, not caring about everything in the outside world.

Even when a top Ancient Demon-level powerhouse visited, he ignored it.

In a flash, the long years passed.

this day.

Ye Tian's Ten Thousand Law Form Secret Method, Ah Luo's Golden Body Form Secret Method, and Ah Luo's Arm Form Secret Method were all cultivated by him to the second form perfection realm.

"You can go to the Ancient Demon Realm, although after breaking through to the Ancient Demon Realm, you will lose the treatment of the Emperor List, but with my current net worth, I don't need this Emperor List treatment, besides, there are still incomparably long years to comprehend the projection of the Ancient Demon Pillar of Time and Space, and I can't wait. "

"Rather than this, it's better to break through directly!"

Ye Tian said darkly.
